derived.causal_summary: Ran a verify-first batch fix over the remaining 15 of the 20 scouted targets (batch 1 fixed the top 5): 15 parallel gpt-5.5-fast confirm deep-dives classified each headline (4 CONFIRMED, 9 partial-but-real, 2 REFUTED — the package.json hook-tests specs/ path is fine because specs/ is a symlink to .opencode/specs/, and the reconsolidation env-leak does not actually leak), then 13 disjoint-file implement-and-test agents fixed the confirmed + partial targets across 22 files (sources + added regression tests), fixing only the REAL part of each partial. Spans chunking (maxLength/budget guard + code-point-safe truncation), the deep-loop runtime (coverage-graph vacuous-pass, gemini fallback model, fanout-merge resolvedQuestionsById), embeddings (hf-local dim contract), vector-index validation (active-row unique index), skill-advisor (semantic-shadow liveness), code-graph (readiness-marker workspace-root), and benchmark/runner tooling (conditional --agent, mk-skill-advisor.js import). Every fix has a regression test; comment-hygiene clean; system-spec-kit + skill-advisor + code-graph builds exit 0; deep-loop .cjs node --check OK.
